Conclusion: In the case of G. biloba extract, particular attention should be paid to the potentially increased risk of bleeding complications, especially when it is taken concomitantly with other drugs which interfere with the coagulation system.
Reference: Fatal intracerebral mass bleeding associated with Ginkgo biloba and ibuprofen
